settings.editor: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

settings.sg_icon_description: Every inquiry is reviewed by our team within 24 hours.
We accommodate early mornings, late nights, and weekends.
A dedicated coordinator for corporate and large bookings.

settings.editor: A few of the questions we hear most often. Need something specific? Talk to our team — we're quick to reply.

items.item_title: What's included in the hourly rate?
Do you offer discounts for longer projects?

settings.editor: Every booking includes the room, core equipment for that studio type, fast Wi-Fi, coffee and an on-site host to help you set up.
Yes — additional lenses, lighting, backdrops, props and crew can be added at checkout or by talking to our team.
Most studios start at one hour. Video and multi-purpose spaces have a two-hour minimum to allow proper setup.
Half-day, full-day and multi-day bookings come with progressively better rates. Reach out for custom project pricing.
Yes — convenient on-site parking is available for clients, team members, and equipment loading during your booking.
